tagline: Your Trusted Septic & Excavation Contractor in Blairstown, NJ

hero.headline: 18 Years of Honest Work Done Right
hero.subheadline: From septic systems to excavation and landscaping, Drake's has served Warren County families since 2008. Owner Frank G personally oversees every project so you never wonder who's on your property.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Excavation, Septic & Landscaping<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors. Drake's handles your entire project from permits and engineering to final installation and cleanup.

cards.title: Septic System Design & Installation
cards.description: Full-service septic from engineering and permits to installation and inspections. We manage the entire process so you don't have to.

cards.title: Excavation & Site Work
cards.description: Residential and commercial excavation including drainage, utilities, foundations, and grading. Heavy equipment operated by experienced hands.

cards.title: Hardscaping
cards.description: Patios, walkways, and retaining walls built on proper bases with drainage consideration. Designed to last decades, not seasons.

cards.title: Commercial Landscaping
cards.description: Year-round property maintenance for businesses. Reliable scheduling, turf health management, and a consistently professional appearance.

cards.title: Land Clearing
cards.description: Complete land clearing for construction or landscaping projects. We handle trees, brush, stumps, and debris removal efficiently.

cards.title: Snow Removal & Lawn Care
cards.description: Seasonal services including snow plowing, mowing, fertilization, and garden maintenance to keep your property safe and attractive year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Finished Project

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. Frank will visit your property, assess the scope of work, and provide an honest quote with no hidden fees or pressure.

steps.title: We Handle the Details
steps.description: From engineering plans and permits to scheduling inspections, our team manages the entire process. You stay informed at every step without the headaches.

steps.title: Enjoy the Finished Result
steps.description: Your project is completed on time, within budget, and built to last. We stand behind our work and are always a phone call away if you need us.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Drake's
about.headline: Family Owned, Locally Operated, Personally Invested
about.description: Since 2008, Frank G and the Drake's team have been serving Blairstown and surrounding counties with the kind of care you only get from a family business. We treat every property like our own because our reputation in this community is everything to us.

features.title: Owner On Every Job Site
features.description: Frank personally oversees each project from start to finish. You always know who is responsible for your work.

features.title: Honest, Transparent Pricing
features.description: We quote what we mean and mean what we quote. No surprise fees, no inflated change orders, no games.

features.title: Full-Service Project Management
features.description: Engineering, permits, approvals, installation, and inspections. We handle every detail so you don't have to chase paperwork.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate before work begins. We earn your trust with honest numbers, not hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our work doesn't meet your expectations, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our 4.9-star reputation on standing behind every project, and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope and permit requirements. For urgent situations like failed septic systems, we prioritize emergency response. Call us and we'll give you an honest timeline.

faqs.question: Do you handle all the permits and approvals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we manage the entire permit process from start to finish. Engineering plans, county approvals, health department requirements, and final inspections. You never have to visit a municipal office.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Warren, Sussex, Morris, Hunterdon, Passaic, and Essex counties in New Jersey. If you're unsure whether we cover your area, just give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a licensed septic contractor in the State of New Jersey, BBB accredited, and carry full liability insurance. We're also approved through HomeAdvisor and Angi certified.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes. Frank will come to your property, assess the work needed, and provide a detailed written estimate at no charge and no obligation. We believe in earning your business with transparency.

testimonials.name: Jeff H.
testimonials.text: Drake's Landscaping provides absolute the BEST landscaping and lawn care service we have ever had in our 20 years here. Highly recommend them to anyone.

testimonials.name: Richard M.
testimonials.text: Ever since Drake's took care of my yard I have been getting compliments on my garden. Professional, reliable, and they truly care about the quality of their work.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Frank handled every aspect of our septic installation including all the permits. He was very professional about explaining the process every step of the way. Cannot say enough great things about this company.
